title: 'Bad for our country,' Trump says of justices who ruled against him
shortDescription: The president's latest attack on Neil Gorsuch and Amy Coney Barrett comes eight days after Chief Justice said such personal hostility has 'got to stop.'

title: Trump mulls seizing Iran's Kharg Island, reports say. What to know
shortDescription: Iran's Kharg Island has been targeted by U.S. air strikes before, but multiple media reports say Trump is considering going a step further.

title: Trump reveals 'present' from Iran
shortDescription: President Donald Trump revealed a "present" from Iran, in the form of oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Will the National Guard be deployed to Atlanta airport? What Trump said
shortDescription: President Trump said at an event he is thinking about sending the National Guard to airports to assist TSA as shutdown continues.

title: Is Trump facing impeachment in 2026? Here's what's been tried
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has expressed concern about being impeached again if Democrats take control of the House. Have they voted to impeach in 2026?

title: Republicans give Trump inaugural 'America First award'
shortDescription: The Republican Party gave the first-ever "America First award" to U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday, March 25.

title: Trump's phone number 'worst-kept secret,' with 50+ interviews in weeks
shortDescription: The Atlantic and Semafor reported that President Donald Trump's phone number is being traded among journalists in Washington. Was it leaked?

title: White House installs Christopher Columbus statue
shortDescription: The White House reveals a new Christopher Columbus statue as debate continues over his legacy and impact on Indigenous people.

title: Trump says Iran gifted 10 'big boats of oil' amid talks to end war
shortDescription: Iranian leaders have vowed no negotiations are underway. The president says the country’s leaders are afraid to admit they want to make peace.

title: DOJ settles with Michael Flynn, gives Trump ally undisclosed sum
shortDescription: The Justice Department’s move to settle comes in response to a lawsuit brought by the retired general turned conspiracy theorist over an earlier DOJ prosecution of Flynn.

title: Trump says he may send National Guard to airports
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has already deployed federal immigration officers to airports to assist TSA amid a partial government shutdown.

title: Trump claims Iran ‘afraid’ to admit negotiations

title: Trump avoids calling Iran conflict a ‘war’
shortDescription: President Trump explained his reasoning behind refusing to call the Iran conflict a "war," citing the need to get Congressional approval.

title: Melania and Barron vote by mail, despite Donald Trump trying to restrict it
shortDescription: The president wants Congress to ban most mail-in voting. But his wife and their son, Barron, like Trump, voted by mail in a special Tuesday election.

title: Could CA Democrats miss general election? Poll has Republicans ahead
shortDescription: Conservative commentator Steve Hilton and Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco lead among likely voters, with Democratic candidates trailing.

title: Melania Trump joins a robot (yes, a robot) at White House
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump, a former fashion model, strutted into a White House summit alongside a humanoid robot.

title: The art of the Barron Trump deal unlocked in tea venture
shortDescription: Barron Trump is listed as a director of a new company that will market yerba mate, a popular South American tea that is winning fans worldwide.

title: Trump prepared to 'unleash hell,' says White House
shortDescription: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt told reporters President Donald Trump "does not bluff" and is prepared to "unleash hell" against Iran.

title: A Democrat won in Trump's 'backyard.' What could it mean for the midterms?
shortDescription: "If Democrats can win in Trump’s backyard, we sure as hell can win anywhere across the country," DNC Chair Ken Martin said on social media.
